steps.title: Find the antecedent
steps.content: The pronoun refers to the star's wobble, which is a single nonhuman phenomenon. The pronoun must therefore be singular.

steps.title: Reject number mismatches
steps.content: Choice A and Choice C are plural, so they do not agree with the singular wobble. Choice D is distributive and would require a group of items, not one wobble.

steps.title: Choose the singular pronoun
steps.content: It correctly refers back to the singular noun wobble in the phrase attributed it to the gravitational influence of the exoplanet. The answer is B.
